references.name: documentation-web-viewer-system
references.description: Static JS documentation viewer (docs/index.html) with: markdown parsing, Mermaid rendering, 4-theme system, bilingual FR/EN, portrait/landscape toggle, doc-header convention (nav-back, actual page link, version tag, collapsible metadata), unified chrome bar for embeds, TOC generation (two-column 8+), corporate PDF export (cover centered, TOC page 2, running header/footer, blue liners), corporate DOCX export (same styling via MSO elements), internal link interceptor with viewer URL rewriting, Liquid tag resolver, soft-coupled baseurl auto-detection. Main navigator interface with draggable panel dividers (drag + click-to-step), publication card links via viewerRewriteUrl.

references.name: display-conventions-and-stats-system
references.description: Session topic covering display convention fixes and stats system build-out. Conventions: fixed stale session nodes, added useMaxWidth, fixed stats format, added empty-category rule, near memory depth 4, far_memory verbatim rule. Work: created depth_config.json, set_depth.py, mindmap_filter.py, memory_stats.py, /mind-stats skill, /mind-depth skill. All verified with no regressions.
